title: microphyes robustus var. robustus
intro: Microphyes robustus var. robustus, also known as Robust Mountain Mint or Wild Bergamot, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Microphyes robustus var. robustus are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
